title: bud.bats refactoring: $TEST_SCRATCH_DIR
body:
Hundreds of unnecessary (and unwanted) duplications of `${TEST_SCRATCH_DIR}/something`. Cleaned up in two passes: one, a simple script, two, manual eyeballing and fixing of cases where the script didn't do the right thing. Please see individual commit messages for each commit.

Almost impossible to review, although if you have a good colorizing `diff` I was able to get into a good groove by diffing against `main` (i.e., both commits together) then occasionally diffing just the part-2 commit to see what the gotchas were.

I find this important for legibility and also for future test development: pretty much all tests are copy-pasted from existing tests, and this PR should make future tests better.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
none
```
